content: Education B.Tech in Artificial Intelligence Engineering Amrita Vishwa Vidyapeetham CGPA:8.79/10.0 June, 2023 12th Grade, The Indian School, Bahrain Percentage - 89.2% April, 2019 12th Grade, The Indian School, Bahrain CGPA: 10.0/10.0 April, 2017
Research Interests Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Data Science, Natural Language Processing, Computer Vision
Coursework taken Deep Learning for Signal and Image Processing, AI in speech processing, AI in natural language processing

Lunar Crater Detection and Depth Analysis May 2022 - Ongoing The goal of the project was to use images from Chandrayaan-2 satellite to map out craters on the lunar surface. Created dataset using web scraping Analyzed images from Terrain Mapping Camera along with DEM from Chandrayaan-2 satellite on the ISRO website Google Colab Pro is being used due to huge dataset size. Still working on developing the model Can used to determine the perfect location for landing lunar rovers.

Sudoku Solver Sept 2021 – Dec 2021 Simple web-based application that takes a photo of an unsolved sudoku puzzle, solves it and returns the image to the user. Led the team in developing the model for the system. Built upon image processing concepts and OpenCV to capture sudoku from input image. Due to generalized preprocessing of the cells, model was able to recognize the sudoku 80% of the time.

Image Captioning System Jan 2022 – May 2022 Implemented a multi-model system to understand an image and return a caption describing the image to the user. Led the team in developing the model for the system. Uses image processing concepts and OpenCV to capture sudoku from input images. Due to generalized preprocessing of the cells, the model was able to recognize the sudoku 80% of the time.

Driver Drowsiness Detection Jan 2022 - May 2022 Processes image of a person and passes the cropped image of eyes to check the level of drowsiness of a person. Designed a CNN architecture to detect drowsy eyes and score them. Analyzed different models for this purpose, like InceptionV3, Xception, VGG and ResNet. Best model had 87% accuracy in detecting and scoring.

CERTIFICATIONS NVIDIA DLI CERTIFICATE – FUNDAMENTALS OF DEEP LEARNING, Issued by NVIDIA, Nov 2021 INTERMEDIATE MACHINE LEARNING, Issued by KAGGLE, Oct 2021 Artificial Intelligence & Reinforcement Learning WORKSHOP CERTIFICATION, Shaastra 2022, IIT Madras, Feb 2022

COMPUTER/SOFTWARE/TECHNICAL SKILLS Domains: Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Time Series Analysis and Forecasting Languages: Python, Java, C, C++, ReactJS Database and Client/Server Technologies: MongoDB, MySQL Frameworks: VSCode, Matlab, Rstudio, VMWare, Android Studio
